policy: Publishable baseline numbers must come from official upstream code when an official repository exists.

baselines.initial_notes: Official repo is for CacheGen/LMCache KV streaming. Artifact scripts target LongChat, NarrativeQA, TriviaQA and require CacheGen environment plus torchac CUDA extension. Accuracy evaluation may require OPENAI_API_KEY for some scripts.

Official LongBench entry exists and supports 2wikimqa, musique, and passage_retrieval_en. It uses hard-coded model and dataset path maps; running on our Llama-3.1-8B repeated-context slice requires an adapter/config patch that must not change SKVQ algorithm code.

Official repo includes SpectrumKV package, GPU experiments, and processed/raw experiment data. It targets WikiText-2 PPL, NIAH, and PD-disaggregated transfer policies rather than the current repeated-context QA dataset; alignment requires a documented adapter or a separate comparable slice.
